name: Summer Garden Cabbage Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 green peppers, sliced into 1-inch thick pieces
1 yellow pepper, sliced into 1-inch thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. This recipe is best made the day before so it can marinate overnight.
2. In a large glass bowl, shred the red cabbage and carrots.
3. Cut the green peppers, yellow pepper, apple, onion, and garlic into small pieces.
4. Lightly toss the shredded vegetables together in the bowl with the chopped ingredients.
5. Mix the fat-free Italian salad dressing with the brown sugar until well combined.
6. Pour the dressing mixture over the salad and mix thoroughly.
7. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
